title: Scape and Run: Dimension
description: Adds a new dimension completely infested with parasites.
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a4f15b6cc52ea51df22dd2ab53d9a1b2fc7e7f5.png)
**An addon for [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites), adds a new dimension completely infested with parasites. The addon currently includes an infested city, several biomes and 6 new creatures.**
### Mod support:

- Techguns - (configured generation of mobs from the mod).
- Galacticraft - (is a visual representation of the parasite planet).
- Mekanism - (ore processing added).
- Ambient Sounds 6 - (added compatibility).
 

The addon is customizable in the configs, you can change the loot lists, loot drop from mobs and their spawning

## Help/Support/Suggestions:

[Join Discord](https://discord.gg/peU9jS8rhA)

 

## Features:
- New biomes: "Ocean" and "Disaster biome"
- Parasite City - (a giant colony of parasites).
- New city buildings and their degree of deterioration and vermin infestation.
- New random dungeons (small to medium-sized colony).
- Vending machines.
- New blocks: "Gold Gate" and "Decorative block".
- Mod support:
  - MCHeli.
  - Thaumcraft.
  - CoFH mods.
  - HBM Nuclear Tech.
